Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Produtos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Nome') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Código') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Ref.Cód.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'UND') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'NCM') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Ativo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Marca') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Cód.Barras') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWimpProdutoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWimpProdutoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf ProRef.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible ProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible ProEmbUnd.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible NcmCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible ProSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible MarNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible ProBar.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ProRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon054_TrabalharGrades, &TrabalharGrades) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = impProduto.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ProCod) &ActionsGrou.Clear() &ActionsGrou.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(1, 'Alterar Preço Venda') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(2, 'Imagens Produto') If (ProIsGra <> true and &TrabalharGrades = 'S') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(3, 'Montar Grade') Endif If (ProIsGra = true and &TrabalharGrades = 'S') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(4, 'Editar Grades') Endif If (ProTipDef in (Definicao.FABRICADO, Definicao.SUBPRODUTO)) &ActionsGrou.AddItem(5, 'Receita do Produto') Endif If (ProTipDef <> Definicao.FABRICADO) &ActionsGrou.AddItem(6, 'Fornecedores do Produto') Endif &ActionsGrou.AddItem(7, 'Clonar Produto') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(8, 'Locação do Produto') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(9, 'Consulta Estoque') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(10, 'Excluir Produto') ProRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_Produto.Ativo, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ ProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('WWIMPPRODUTO', EmpCod, ProCod) EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWimpProdutoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionsGrou.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionsGrou = 1 Do 'Do AlterarPreco' Case &ActionsGrou = 2 Do 'Do imgProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 3 Do 'Do MontarGrade' Case &ActionsGrou = 4 Do 'Do EditarGrades' Case &ActionsGrou = 5 Do 'Do MateriaPrima' Case &ActionsGrou = 6 Do 'Do FornecedorProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 7 Do 'Do ClonarProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 8 Do 'Do locacaoProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 9 Do 'Do ConsultaEstoque' Case &ActionsGrou = 10 Do 'Do ExcluirProduto' EndCase &ActionsGrou = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ impProduto.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(ProCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoListagemProdutos' wpListagemProdutos.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWimpProduto.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWimpProduto.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProRef", '', !'Ref.Cód.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProNom", '', !'Descrição Produto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProEmbUnd", '', !'UND', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NcmCod", '', !'NCM', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProSts", '', !'Ativo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MarNom", '', !'Marca', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProBar", '', !'Cód.Barras', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWimpProdutoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProBar1.Visible = False &NcmCod1.Visible = False &MarCod1.Visible = False &MarNom1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProBar2.Visible = False &NcmCod2.Visible = False &MarCod2.Visible = False &MarNom2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProBar3.Visible = False &NcmCod3.Visible = False &MarCod3.Visible = False &MarNom3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarPreco' &AuxProCod = ProCod do 'chamaTabela' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do imgProduto' WWImagemProduto.Popup(ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MontarGrade' WpMontaGrade.Link(ProCod, 'WWIMPPRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EditarGrades' wpEditaGrade.Link(EmpCod, ProCod, 'WWIMPPRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MateriaPrima' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTORECEITA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &AutNiv) If &AutNiv >= 2 wpProdutoReceita.Popup('', EmpCod, ProCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado a Rotina [WWPRODUTORECEITA] Requerido Nível 2') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FornecedorProduto' wpfornecedorproduto.Call(ProCod, 'WWIMPPRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ClonarProduto' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &AddAutNiv) if &AddAutNiv >= 2 wpClonarProduto.Popup(EmpCod, ProCod) Refresh Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 2, Adicionar/Alterar Produto. [WWPRODUTO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do locacaoProduto' LocacaoProduto.Popup(true, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultaEstoque' wpConsultaEstoque.Link(ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirProduto' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &ExcluirAutNiv) if &ExcluirAutNiv >= 3 ExcluirProduto.Popup(EmpCod, ProCod, 1) Refresh Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 3, Excluir Produto. [WWPRODUTO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMCOD' &NcmCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWimpProdutoColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMCOD' AND not &NcmCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"impProduto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'chamaTabela' RetornaTabelaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &FilTabCod) For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &FilTabCod wpadicionaprodutotabela.Popup('P', &AuxProCod, TabCod, TabUltAlt, false) Exit When None msg('Não existe tabela padrão na Filial!') EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
